initializers.name: initAccordion
initializers.description: Initializes accordion groups, state, and keyboard navigation.

initializers.name: initAxolothBehaviors
initializers.description: Initializes every Axoloth behavior and returns a combined controller.

initializers.name: initDialog
initializers.description: Initializes modal dialogs with focus management and nested layer handling.

initializers.name: initDrawer
initializers.description: Initializes accessible viewport drawers with backdrop, focus management, and scroll locking.

initializers.name: initDropdown
initializers.description: Initializes dropdown menus, dismissal, focus, and keyboard navigation.

initializers.name: initOffcanvas
initializers.description: Initializes accessible off-canvas sidebars and their backdrop controls.

initializers.name: initTabs
initializers.description: Initializes tab relationships, activation modes, and roving keyboard focus.

initializers.name: initToast
initializers.description: Initializes toast regions, notification lifecycle, timers, and actions.

dataAttributes.name: data-axo-accordion
dataAttributes.description: Marks an accordion group root.

dataAttributes.name: data-axo-accordion-collapsible
dataAttributes.description: Controls whether the final open accordion item may close.

dataAttributes.name: data-axo-accordion-multiple
dataAttributes.description: Allows multiple accordion items to remain open.

dataAttributes.name: data-axo-accordion-panel
dataAttributes.description: Identifies an accordion panel by its owned item key.

dataAttributes.name: data-axo-accordion-trigger
dataAttributes.description: Identifies the control for an accordion panel.

dataAttributes.name: data-axo-dialog-dismiss
dataAttributes.description: Dismisses the referenced dialog.

dataAttributes.name: data-axo-dialog-id
dataAttributes.description: Defines the identifier of a controlled dialog layer.

dataAttributes.name: data-axo-dialog-toggle
dataAttributes.description: Toggles the referenced dialog.

dataAttributes.name: data-axo-drawer-dismiss
dataAttributes.description: Dismisses the referenced drawer layer.

dataAttributes.name: data-axo-drawer-id
dataAttributes.description: Defines the identifier of a controlled drawer layer.

dataAttributes.name: data-axo-drawer-toggle
dataAttributes.description: Toggles the referenced drawer layer.

dataAttributes.name: data-axo-dismiss
dataAttributes.description: Dismisses the referenced off-canvas layer.

dataAttributes.name: data-axo-dropdown
dataAttributes.description: Marks a dropdown component root.

dataAttributes.name: data-axo-dropdown-item
dataAttributes.description: Marks an interactive item inside a dropdown menu.

dataAttributes.name: data-axo-dropdown-menu
dataAttributes.description: Identifies the menu owned by a dropdown trigger.

dataAttributes.name: data-axo-dropdown-toggle
dataAttributes.description: Identifies the control that toggles a dropdown menu.

dataAttributes.name: data-axo-id
dataAttributes.description: Defines the identifier of a controlled off-canvas layer.

dataAttributes.name: data-axo-tab
dataAttributes.description: Identifies a tab control by its panel key.

dataAttributes.name: data-axo-tab-panel
dataAttributes.description: Identifies a panel owned by a tab control.

dataAttributes.name: data-axo-tabs
dataAttributes.description: Marks a tabs component root.

dataAttributes.name: data-axo-tabs-activation
dataAttributes.description: Selects automatic or manual keyboard tab activation.

dataAttributes.name: data-axo-toast
dataAttributes.description: Marks a generated or declarative toast element.

dataAttributes.name: data-axo-toast-dismiss
dataAttributes.description: Marks a control that dismisses its toast.

dataAttributes.name: data-axo-toast-duration
dataAttributes.description: Overrides a toast duration in milliseconds.

dataAttributes.name: data-axo-toast-priority
dataAttributes.description: Selects polite or assertive live announcement priority.

dataAttributes.name: data-axo-toast-region
dataAttributes.description: Marks a live region that owns toast notifications.

dataAttributes.name: data-axo-toast-tone
dataAttributes.description: Provides a semantic tone hook for a toast.

dataAttributes.name: data-axo-toggle
dataAttributes.description: Toggles the referenced off-canvas layer.

events.name: axo:accordion-close
events.description: Fires after an accordion panel closes.

events.name: axo:accordion-open
events.description: Fires after an accordion panel opens.

events.name: axo:dropdown-close
events.description: Fires after a dropdown menu closes.

events.name: axo:dropdown-open
events.description: Fires after a dropdown menu opens.

events.name: axo:offcanvas-close
events.description: Fires after an off-canvas layer closes.

events.name: axo:offcanvas-open
events.description: Fires after an off-canvas layer opens.

events.name: axo:tabs-change
events.description: Fires when a tabs component changes its active tab.

events.name: axo:toast-dismiss
events.description: Fires when a toast begins dismissal.

events.name: axo:toast-show
events.description: Fires after a toast is shown in a region.
